taxonomy: Hippion altaicum is a fossil genus of hippopotamus, classified within the family Hippopotamidae. It is an extinct genus that lived during the Pleistocene epoch. The classification of Hippion altaicum is within the order Artiodactyla, which comprises even-toed ungulates. As a member of the Hippopotamidae family, Hippion altaicum is closely related to modern hippopotamus species. Its classification within the kingdom Animalia and phylum Chordata further emphasizes its position as a mammal.
